HOMECOMING VOYAGE UPDATE NOTE


I. Homecoming Voyage — New Character | Weapon | CUB | Coatings

1) New S-Rank Omniframe: Lucia: Inverse Crown

From June 2, 2026 (after maintenance) to July 17, 2026, 05:00 (UTC), the new S-Rank Omniframe [Lucia: Inverse Crown] will be available via the "Phylotree Nexus" Research. There is a 100% chance to get Lucia: Inverse Crown upon getting an S-Rank Construct.


——"Phylotree Nexus" Research Instructions——

- This "Phylotree Nexus" Research period includes "Inverse Crown Event Construct" Research and "Fate Inverse Crown Event Construct" Research.

- The rules for "Phylotree Nexus" Research are identical to those of the "Themed Construct" Research. You can perform research using [Event Construct R&D Tickets].

- The pity counter for "Phylotree Nexus" is shared with and carries over to the "Themed Construct" Research. Specifically, the "Inverse Crown Event Construct" Research shares and inherits pity with the "Themed Construct" Research, while the "Fate Inverse Crown Event Construct" Research shares and inherits pity with the "Fate Themed Construct" Research.

- The featured character can only be obtained through the "Phylotree Nexus" Research and will return via the "Phylotree Nexus" rerun pool in future versions.

- The methods for obtaining character shards in the "Phylotree Nexus" Research are identical to other S-Rank Omniframes from the "Themed Construct" pool. This applies to duplicates converted into shards, purchasing via [Phantom Pain Scars] in the Phantom Pain Cage Shop, and purchasing via [Inver-Shards] in the Voucher Shop.

- The availability period for the character's 6★ Weapon and CUB will run parallel to the character's banner. They can be obtained via the "Phylotree Nexus Weapon Target" Research and "Phylotree Nexus CUB" Research.



2) New 6★ Weapon: Lightless Dusk (Inverse Crown Exclusive)

From June 2, 2026 (after maintenance) to July 17, 2026, 05:00 (UTC), the new 6★ Weapon [Lightless Dusk] will be available via the "Phylotree Nexus Weapon Target" Research. This pool follows the standard drop rates and rules of regular weapon research.

*Once the event concludes, [Lightless Dusk] will not be available via the "Target Weapon" Research. Furthermore, it will not be added to the "Weapon Research" pool in future versions.



3) New S-Rank CUB: Allos

From June 2, 2026 (after maintenance) to July 17, 2026, 05:00 (UTC), the new S-Rank CUB [Allos] will be available via the "Phylotree Nexus CUB" Research. There is a 100% chance to get Allos upon getting an S-Rank CUB.

*Once the event concludes, [Allos] will not be available via the "CUB Target" Research.



4) "Phylotree Nexus" Research Rerun

——"Phylotree Nexus" Research Rerun Instructions——

- This rerun features two pools: "Phylotree Nexus" Rerun and "Fate Phylotree Nexus" Rerun.

- The rules for "Phylotree Nexus" Rerun are identical to those of the "Themed Construct" Research. You can perform research using [Event Construct R&D Tickets].

- The "Phylotree Nexus" Rerun pool shares a pity counter with the current "Phylotree Nexus" pool and the "Themed Construct" Research, and the pity count carries over between pools of the same type. Specifically, the "Phylotree Nexus" Rerun pool shares and inherits pity with the "Inverse Crown Event Construct" pool and the "Themed Construct" pool, while the "Fate Phylotree Nexus" Rerun pool shares and inherits pity with the "Fate Inverse Crown Event Construct" pool and the "Fate Themed Construct" pool.

- Characters in the "Phylotree Nexus" Rerun cannot be obtained through any other research methods for the time being. They will return via the "Phylotree Nexus" series Research pools in future versions.

- The methods for obtaining character shards in the "Phylotree Nexus" Rerun are identical to other S-Rank Omniframes from the "Themed Construct" pool. This applies to duplicates converted into shards, purchasing via [Phantom Pain Scars] in the Phantom Pain Cage Shop, and purchasing via [Inver-Shards] in the Voucher Shop.

- The availability period for the character's 6★ Weapon and CUB will run parallel to the character's banner. They can be obtained via the "Phylotree Nexus Weapon Target" Research and "Phylotree Nexus CUB" Research. The probability of obtaining rerun content is identical to the current "Phylotree Nexus" Research.

Event Period: 06/05/2026 10:00 - 07/17/2026 05:00 (UTC)

Rerun Content: S-Rank Omniframe [Liv: Limpidity], 6★ Weapon [Ripples of the Aloft Sea], S-Rank CUB [Levvi]

7) [Fluttering Ballet] Coating Research

Access the event via [Main Interface] - [Fluttering Ballet] event entrance and exchange for [Plume Wish Invitations]. [Plume Wish Invitations] are the exclusive currency for the "Fluttering Ballet" Research Pool and can be used to draw rewards from it. The fully-voiced Coating Story [Path of Unclouded Hearts] is also available for Commandants to experience.

——Rewards Overview——

Core Layer Reward: Main Interface Scene [Path of Unclouded Hearts] x1 (includes gyroscope mode and exclusive music; exclusive music will be unlocked in the Music Player)

1st Layer Reward: SFX Coating [Fluttering Ballet] x1 (for Liv: Limpidity, includes bonus item [Gallery - Fluttering Ballet], which can be unlocked in Codex - Gallery)

2nd Layer Rewards: Event Construct R&D Ticket x2500, Target Weapon R&D Ticket x2500, 6★ Weapon Resonance Material x1

Milestone Rewards: Reach the following numbers of researches to obtain the corresponding rewards.

 50 Researches: Weapon Coating [Crystalline Whimsy]

 70 Researches: Portrait [Fluttering Ballet]

 90 Researches: Portrait Frame [Fluttering Ballet]

Event Period: 06/05/2026 10:00 - 07/17/2026 05:00 (UTC)


——Event Rules——

◆ Each research attempt costs [Plume Wish Invitation] x1, which can be exchanged for 175 Black Cards or 5 Rainbow Cards at a discount.

◆ There are two types of rewards: Special Rewards and Common Rewards. Each draw will be determined by the drop rates listed below.

◆ Drop Rates:

- [Special Reward]: 1%, [Common Reward]: 99%

- A special reward is guaranteed within every 20 draws. All special rewards have limited quantities and cannot be obtained again once claimed.

◆ Expiration Conversion: After the event, unused [Plume Wish Invitations] will be converted into Basic Construct R&D Tickets at a ratio of 1:175.

*The following content will be unlocked after obtaining Liv: Limpidity's Coating [Fluttering Ballet]:

◆ The character will feature an eye-tracking effect on the main interface and the interaction interface.

◆ Exclusive [Battle Start & Results] animations and voice lines for the [Fluttering Ballet] Coating

◆ The [Fluttering Ballet] Coating features a new Ultima ring appearance and an exclusive [Standby Pose]. Be sure to check them out!

◆ Owning and equipping the [Fluttering Ballet] Coating unlocks [Display Pose 5]. Equip the [Fluttering Ballet] Coating alongside the [Path of Unclouded Hearts] scene to unlock an additional [Display Pose 4].



8) Tactical Assessment Manual - Homecoming File

The rating missions consist of Daily Missions, Weekly Missions, and Manual Missions. Complete these missions to earn Intel Value to raise your Rating Level and claim the rewards.

The Tactical Assessment Manual - Homecoming File features Encrypted Intel (30 Rainbow Cards) and Top-Secret Intel (68 Rainbow Cards). Unlock the corresponding intel and meet the required conditions to obtain Trade Vouchers, CUB R&D Tickets, Event Construct R&D Tickets, [Assessment Manual Shard Choice], and [Generic - Final Alternate Coating] (Recommended for Lucia: Inverse Crown).

Event Period: After the version update on 06/02/2026 - 05:00 (UTC), 07/17/2026

Special Notes:

• Encrypted Intel and Top-Secret Intel are mutually exclusive tiers and can be purchased independently.

• Purchases for both Intel tiers will close 20 minutes before the event ends. Please keep a close eye on the event timer.

• After purchases close and before the event ends, you can still complete missions and claim corresponding rewards.


Please note the relevant announcements for new bundle contents and availability.




II. Homecoming Voyage — New Content & Event Gameplay

1) Main Story - Homecoming Voyage

Requirement: Clear Main Story 1-12

Duration: After the version update on June 2, 2026



2) Long Live the Crowned - Character Trial Stage

"Long Live the Crowned" is a trial stage for [Lucia: Inverse Crown], where Commandants can learn the basic controls of the new character [Lucia: Inverse Crown]. Complete the character challenge stage to earn collectibles and character training materials.

Requirement: Clear Normal Story 1-8

Duration: After the version update on 06/02/2026 - 05:00 (UTC), 07/17/2026



3) 7-Day Login Sign-in Rewards

Sign in for 7 days total during the event to claim all rewards, including Coating Pick Supply Pack x1 (up to [Hollow Crown] for Vera: Geiravor) and Basic Construct R&D Tickets.

Requirement: Commandant Lv.20 and above

Duration: After the version update on 06/02/2026 - 05:00 (UTC), 07/16/2026



4) Mugwort's Blessing Sign-in Event

Sign in for 3 days total during the event to claim all rewards, including Event Construct R&D Ticket x250, Serum Bundle β (M) x2, and Stamp [Roux the Seven Seas].

Duration: 06/19/2026 10:00 - 06/27/2026 05:00 (UTC)



5) Tidal Twirl

• Tidal Twirl rewards can only be drawn once. Spend [Summer Radiance Vouchers] to participate in the draw.

• Complete event missions during the event to obtain [Summer Radiance Vouchers]. The vouchers will be automatically recycled after the event ends.

• Participate in the event to earn S-Rank Omniframe Choice Pack x1 (up to Ishmael: Parhelion), Event Construct R&D Ticket x2500, Basic Construct R&D Ticket x2500, Trade Voucher x3000, 6★ Memory Resonance Material Pick x2, basic training materials, and more.

• Reach specified total draw milestones during the event to earn event-limited Special R&D Tickets, which can be used for 1 free research in the corresponding R&D pool. A total of 14 research attempts can be obtained during the event. (Special R&D Tickets will expire after the event ends. Please use them in time.)


*Notes:

- The "S-Rank Omniframe Choice Pack" is valid until 05:00 (UTC) on August 6, 2026.

- The event-limited Special R&D Ticket is valid until 05:00 (UTC) on July 16, 2026.

Requirement: Commandant Lv.40 and above

Duration: After the version update on 06/02/2026 - 05:00 (UTC), 07/16/2026



6) Heavenly Tailwind Total Spending Event

Earn bonus rewards by reaching total spending milestones during the event.

Top-up Milestones: Reach 6 / 30 / 128 / 328 / 648 / 1000 Rainbow Cards to claim corresponding tier rewards.

Milestone Rewards:

6 Rainbow Cards: Event Construct R&D Ticket x250, 6★ Memory Resonance Material Pick x1

30 Rainbow Cards: Event Construct R&D Ticket x250, Hypertune Crystal α x960, Hypertune Crystal β x160

128 Rainbow Cards: Event Construct R&D Ticket x500, Phantom Pain Scar x100

328 Rainbow Cards: Event Construct R&D Ticket x1000, Phantom Pain Scar x150, Harmony Accelerator x25

648 Rainbow Cards: Event Construct R&D Ticket x1500, Phantom Pain Scar x250

1000 Rainbow Cards: Event Construct R&D Ticket x2500, 6★ Weapon Choice Pack x1 (up to [Obituary for Yesterday] for Nirvatia: Dirge)

Duration: After the version update on 06/02/2026 - 05:00 (UTC), 07/17/2026



7) Simulation Shop - New Arrivals

Use event currency [Simulation Score] to exchange for rewards.

Requirements: Commandant Lv.16 or above and cleared Normal Story 1-12

——Rewards Overview——

New Arrivals: 6★ Memories [Pavlichenko] and [Clusius], and Decor Set [Deepspace Reverie]

Others: Select 6★ Memory Sets, Aura Basic Units, Aura Chips, Construct Affection Gifts, basic training materials, CUB training materials

Duration: After the version update on June 2, 2026



8) Journal of Promise

After the version update, Commandants can experience Lucia: Inverse Crown's affection story in [Side] - [Journal of Promise].

Duration: After the version update on June 2, 2026



9) Nebulous Vigil - Boss Challenge

• This high-difficulty challenge consists of 6 distinct difficulty tiers. You will battle against the Boss ["Vanguard"].

• Defeated characters will respawn during the challenge.

• Each stage features a 3-star objective. Accumulate 15 stars to claim all Collectible rewards. Obtaining duplicate Collectibles will upgrade their quality.

• Complete all missions to claim rewards including Event Construct R&D Ticket x250, Trade Voucher x200, Collectible ["Vanguard" Data Sample], basic training materials, and more.

Requirement: Commandant Lv.40 and above

Duration: 06/03/2026 10:00 - 06/29/2026 05:00 (UTC)




III. Babylonia — F.O.S. Military Command College

Return to F.O.S. Military Command College and explore the "past" and "future" of F.O.S. together.

1) New Content Overview

• A new area, "F.O.S. Military Command College," has been added to Babylonia. New Invitation Missions and Destined Moments for multiple characters are now available in the area.

• New missions [Homecoming and A New Journey] and [Spear of Safety] have been added to Babylonia. Complete these missions to earn event rewards.

• After the version update, more characters will be available in Babylonia.

2) New Rewards

Participate in the event to earn Event Construct R&D Tickets x875, Trade Voucher x2050, Stamp ["Glowing"], Portrait Frame [Hallowed Vow], basic training materials, and more. Complete in-event missions to earn exclusive Commandant costume [Raven Regalia], photos, decorations, Commandant accessory, ornament, and more.

3) Requirement

Commandant Level 40 or above

4) Duration

After the version update on 06/02/2026




IV. Shrouded Requiem

1) Event Info

• Shrouded Requiem is a permanent game mode, consisting of two parts: "Labyrinth Breakthrough" and "Nightshroud Tales".

• In "Labyrinth Breakthrough," equip characters with skills and relics to challenge powerful enemies.

• In "Nightshroud Tales," consume [Sealed Documents] to unlock character stories and challenge stages.

• This mode features both limited-time and permanent missions. Participate in "Labyrinth Breakthrough" and "Nightshroud Tales" to complete missions and earn permanent currency and limited-time currency rewards.

• Spend corresponding currency to redeem rewards from the shop.

2) Event Rewards

Participate in this mode to earn Event Construct R&D Tickets x2000, Trade Voucher x2000, basic training materials, and more.

3) Requirement

Commandant Level 40 or above

4) Duration

After the version update on 06/02/2026




V. Rapid Pursuit

1) Event Info

• The event features 4 stages, each with 4 difficulty levels to challenge.

• Take on bounty Bosses across various difficulties using a designated roster of characters.

• Complete bounty missions to claim the corresponding bounty rewards.

2) Event Rewards

Participate in the event to earn Event Construct R&D Ticket x500, Trade Voucher x500, Collectible [Bloodrust Medal], basic training materials, and more.

3) Requirement

Commandant Lv.42 or above

4) Duration

06/16/2026 10:00 - 07/16/2026 05:00 (UTC)




VI. Retro Arcade

1) Event Info

• Three game modes will be available during the event: Fluffy Snooze, Wreck-It Shark-speare, and Cat Grab.

• In Fluffy Snooze, combine target blocks within the limited moves to clear numbered blocks.

• In Wreck-It Shark-speare, clear as many blocks as possible to prevent them from reaching the top.

• In Cat Grab, use upgrades and modifications wisely to collect more Resource Points in stages with shrinking time limits.

2) Event Rewards

Participate in the event to earn Event Construct R&D Ticket x1100, Target Weapon R&D Ticket x100, Basic Construct R&D Ticket x150, Basic Weapon R&D Ticket x100, Trade Voucher x500, Stamp [Taste My FIST!], basic training materials, and more.

3) Requirement

Commandant Level 40 or above

4) Duration

06/23/2026 10:00 - 07/16/2026 05:00 (UTC)




VII. Guild Expedition X

1) Event Info

• Join the Command Bureau and work together with other Commandants to clear stages.

• The Nightmare Points increase as you progress through Guild Expedition stages. At full Nightmare Points, stages will be significantly enhanced.

• The Expedition introduces a Cycle Mode. After defeating the boss "Melinoe," the challenge will restart in an enhanced new cycle.

• The Garrison feature is now available. After clearing a node, you may garrison a character there to permanently reduce that node's HP in subsequent cycles.

• Defeat the final stage together in Guild Expedition to earn stamps and a large amount of currency.

• Various rare materials can be exchanged using currency in the Guild Expedition Shop.

2) Event Rewards

Participate in the event to earn 6★ Weapon Resonance Shard x50, Target Weapon R&D Ticket x500, Trade Voucher x1,000, Stamp "Aloof Inspection," Stamp "Cool Gal Inspection," Stamp "Cool Gals Never Look Back," basic training materials, and more.

3) Requirement

Join a Command Bureau

4) Duration

After the version update on 06/02/2026 - 05:00 (UTC), 07/17/2026




VIII. New Content & Optimizations

——New Features & Optimizations——

1. Added Phylotree Nexus exclusive special effects to both the Members and Team screens.

2. Added the Phylotree Dossier system, now accessible via the Main Story and Members screens.

3. Added a new "Voyage" chapter tab to the Main Story screen, compiled of Main Story chapters from versions [Where Nightmares Dwell] to [Homecoming Voyage].

4. Added a tag feature to the Team Preset screen. Now supports tag configuration for quick filtering based on designated categories.

5. Added a Set Swap feature to the Coating screen. Upon previewing a Coating set, if you own all the matching components, you can now swap to the complete set instantly.

6. Increased the maximum purchase limit for the [Monthly Pass] and introduced a makeup sign-in mechanism. Makeup sign-in items can be obtained by completing weekly missions.

7. [War Zone]: Added new Full-Realm Support buffs: "Rimed Adieu" and "Flame Resurged."

8. [Phantom Pain Cage]: Added new affixes to Intensive Battle: "Frostbound Chasm IV" and "Skyfire Cataclysm II."

9. [Phantom Pain Cage]: Added the new Boss "The Pseudo-Unwinged" to the Ultimate Zone. The Boss "Mutated Mechanoid: Madorea" has been moved to the Outlier Point.

10. Optimized the visuals of story chapters related to the Phylotree Dossier.

11. Optimized the visuals of the Research screen.

12. Optimized the visuals when obtaining an S-Rank Omniframe from Research. A new animation will now play upon acquisition.

13. Optimized the visuals of the [Monthly Pass] screen.

14. Optimized the visuals of the [Tactical Assessment Manual] screen.

15. Optimized the visual and interactive presentation of the [Phantom Pain Cage] and Intensive Battle screens.

16. Optimized the challenge mechanics for Knight and Chaos difficulties in the [Phantom Pain Cage] Ultimate Zone. Auto-Battle now supports saving 100% of the recorded score for Knight and Chaos difficulties.

17. Optimized the display when redeeming Character Inver-Shards. The screen now displays the exact amount required for the next rank.

18. Fixed an issue where the volume of certain sound effects in the background music of Main Story 37-23 was abnormal.

19. During the "Homecoming Voyage" version, following the conclusion of [Clash Reflection] on July 16 at 05:00 (UTC), the new season of [Clash Reflection] will begin after the version update on July 17.

20. Following the [Homecoming Voyage] version update, rewards for [War Zone], [Phantom Pain Cage], [Clash Reflection], and [Tactical Assessment Manual] will be increased as follows:

- [Clash Reflection] Challenge Reward: Trade Vouchers x60 added

- [Phantom Pain Cage] Phantom Scars reward drop from Advanced Zone, Ultimate Zone, and Intensive Battle will be increased. Advanced Zone Progress Milestones reward: Phantom Scars +8; Ultimate Zone Progress Milestones reward: Phantom Scars +20; Intensive Battle Rank Reward: Phantom Scars +6

- [Tactical Assessment Manual] Basic Intel total Trade Vouchers +1000; Encrypted Intel total Trade Vouchers +2000; Top-Secret Intel total Trade Vouchers +3500

- [War Zone] Tier Settlement Rewards will be increased. Elite Defending: Trade Vouchers +75; Elite Promotion: Trade Vouchers +100; Leader Demotion & Defending: Trade Vouchers +140; Leader Promotion: Trade Vouchers +180; Hero Demotion & Defending: Trade Vouchers +240; Hero Promotion: Trade Vouchers +300; Legend Demotion & Defending: Trade Vouchers +400. (This adjustment only applies to War Zones for Commandants of Lv. 80-120. The reward increases will take effect in-game post-update.)

*The reward increases for [Phantom Pain Cage] will take effect starting the next cycle following the "Homecoming Voyage" version update. Increased rewards for the first cycle post-update will be distributed via in-game mail.



——Character-Related Optimizations——

1. Fixed an issue where QTE cooldown would become abnormal under certain circumstances when the maximum number of QTEs was 2.

2. Fixed an issue where the buff values provided by [Veronica: Aegis] were abnormal under certain circumstances.

3. Fixed an issue where the attack count for [Bianca: Crepuscule] while in Departed Mode was abnormal under certain circumstances.

4. Fixed an issue where the Signal Orb color obtained upon entry was abnormal for [Ishmael: Parhelion] under certain circumstances.

5. Fixed an issue where [Kamui: Aeternion]'s Yellow Signal Orb skill "Solar Poise" continued consuming Signal Orbs after releasing the input under certain circumstances.

6. Fixed an issue where the skill effects and audio would play abnormally when [Wanshi: Lucid Dreamer] used the red Signal Orb skill "Flurry Blitz" in certain situations.

7. Fixed an issue where [Rosetta: Arete]'s Signal Orb skill could not properly trigger the Boss "Veronica"'s parry mechanic.

8. Fixed an issue where [Rosetta: Arete]'s Super Armor reduction effect on enemy units was abnormal when dealing Dark DMG.

9. Fixed an issue where [Rosetta: Arete], upon having 2 Grayscale Links and activating the Shadow Reversion animation, would experience an abnormal duration of the Time Lag Calculation effect when rapidly switching to Nessos Mimic in mid-air.

10. Added a new effect to the 2-piece set effect of the Memory [Liston]: Triggering [QTE - Point Blank] now activates the [Frozen Zone] effect. [Frozen Zone] lasts 8 seconds. Repeated triggers refresh the duration.

11. Adjusted the description for the 2-piece set effect of the Memory [Cottie]. The 2-piece set effect now reads: Signature Move requires 20% less Signature Energy. (Text adjustment only; actual effects remain unchanged.)



PGR Team

May 29, 2026
